summary: Workflow is broken and incomplete: references ./test-fixtures/*.json and SemanticVersionBumper.Tests.ps1 which don't exist in deliverable—will fail on execution. Mixed shell types (bash in actionlint step, pwsh elsewhere). PowerShell script missing Set-StrictMode and $ErrorActionPreference safety patterns. Script itself is well-structured with good parameter validation and error handling, but non-functional workflow makes deliverable impossible to execute. Task requires fixtures and tests to run through act—these are absent.
